raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The state currently has no efficient, transparent means of identifying bids from California-based companies during a declared state of emergency.",
    "Senate Bill 1321 aims to create a designation within the state’s emergency bid procurement process for companies headquartered or manufacturing in California to self-identify.",
    "SB 1321 would not preclude any business from bidding nor sacrifice quality or efficiency in the procurement process.",
    "California-based manufacturing companies often lose bids to larger national or international companies during emergencies.",
    "Allocating state budget funds to California-based PPE manufacturers could stimulate the local economy and create job opportunities.",
    "A push for local industry would encourage further technological innovation.",
    "California has a vast number of manufacturers across many different industries."
  ]
}
```
